from source import process_batch

def test_off_by_one_loop():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    result = process_batch(items)
    # The buggy code skips the last element, so length will be 2 instead of 3.
    assert len(result) == len(items), (
        f"Expected {len(items)} items, but got {len(result)}. "
        "Bug: loop range uses len(items)-1, skipping last element."
    )
    # Also verify the correct values to confirm fix works.
    assert result == [2, 4, 6], (
        f"Expected [2, 4, 6] but got {result}. "
        "Bug: last element not processed."
    )
